name: learn-faster
description: FASTER framework learning coach with spaced repetition, active practice, and exam generation.

interface.shortDescription: Learn topics with syllabi, reviews, practice, and exams.
interface.longDescription: A Codex-native learning coach built around the FASTER framework: Forget distractions, Act through practice, manage State, Teach back concepts, Enter learning time, and Review with spaced repetition.
defaultPrompt: Use $learn-faster-exam to make a mock exam.
